title: SourceOSInteractionEvent
description: Shared noetic interaction event envelope for governed chat, terminal, Matrix, and web surfaces that submit tasks, stream results, display governance traces, and hand off evidence across SourceOS.

interactionEventId.description: Stable URN identifier for this interaction event. Pattern: urn:srcos:interaction-event:<local-id>

specVersion.description: SourceOS spec version for this event shape.

eventClass.description: Class of noetic interaction event emitted by a surface or authority plane.

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this interaction event occurred.

surface.description: Surface or authority plane that emitted the event.

surfaceKind.description: Surface family or authority-plane family that produced this event.

sourcePlane.description: Concrete emitting plane or repository identifier such as SocioProphet/Noetica or SourceOS-Linux/agent-term.

clientRef.description: Optional client, device, workspace, or UI instance reference.

mode.description: Execution/routing mode used by the surface.

session.description: Stable conversation and workroom scope binding for the interaction.

roomRef.description: Matrix room, channel, or workroom room reference.

workroomRef.description: Prophet Workspace or Professional Workroom reference.

topicRef.description: Slash Topics or New Hope topic/membrane scope reference.

opsHistoryEventRef.description: Optional OpsHistory event reference when this interaction is durably recorded.

actor.description: Human, agent, bot, service, or system actor responsible for emitting or initiating the event.

actorRef.description: Actor authority reference. Human subjects may use subject URNs; non-human actors must resolve through Agent Registry when enabled.

agentRegistryRef.description: Agent Registry identity/session/grant reference for non-human actors.

onBehalfOfRef.description: Optional subject, workroom, or service reference on whose behalf the actor operated.

participants.description: Participants visible in the interaction. This is descriptive only and does not grant authority.

agentRegistryRef.description: Optional Agent Registry reference for agent-like participants.

task.description: Optional task/request/result projection for model calls, Superconscious submissions, or AgentPlane-mediated runs.

status.description: Task status as visible to the surface.

modelHint.description: Model requested by the surface, before authoritative routing.

modelRouted.description: Model selected by the authoritative model router or standalone provider path.

provider.description: Provider or authority plane serving the task.

latencyMs.description: Observed latency in milliseconds, when available.

steeringIntent.description: Optional steering intent. Blackbox prompting must not be represented as mechanistic SAE steering.

featureRef.description: Feature, layer, or steering primitive reference.

governanceTrace.description: User-visible governance trail carried across web, terminal, Matrix, and authority-plane surfaces.

policyAdmitted.description: Whether policy admitted the visible operation.

policyRef.description: Primary policy reference or denial reference.

policyDecisionRefs.description: Policy Fabric decision references authorizing routing, context release, memory, side effects, export, or redaction.

grantRefs.description: Tool/capability grant references requested or resolved through Agent Registry.

memoryScopeRef.description: Memory Mesh scope reference, if any.

contextPackRefs.description: Context-pack references exchanged with Memory Mesh or AgentPlane.

requestHash.description: Hash of request envelope or prompt-relevant bounded payload.

providerRouteEvidenceRef.description: Provider-route evidence reference for standalone or routed model calls.

agentPlaneRunRef.description: AgentPlane run reference, if execution authority was involved.

payloadMode.description: Payload disclosure posture. Raw sensitive payloads are denied by default.

payload.description: Optional bounded payload. Must not contain raw secrets, credentials, unrestricted browser history, unrestricted shell output, or private chain-of-thought.

sourceEventRefs.description: Upstream source event references from OpsHistory, Matrix, Noetica, AgentTerm, Superconscious, AgentPlane, or provider paths.

redactionRefs.description: Redaction tombstone references that affect this interaction.

integrity.description: Optional integrity envelope for this event.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over canonicalized event content, when present.
